Bash(node -e "import TronWeb from ''tronweb''; const tw = new TronWeb\({fullHost:''https://api.trongrid.io''}\); console.log\(typeof tw.createAccount\); console.log\(typeof tw.utils\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(tw\)\).filter\(k=>typeof tw[k]===''function''\).join\('', ''\)\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import TronWeb from ''tronweb''; console.log\(''keys:'', Object.keys\(TronWeb\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''default:'', typeof TronWeb.default\); console.log\(''TronWeb:'', typeof TronWeb.TronWeb\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''/dev/stdin'',''utf8''\)\); const acc=d.data?.[0]; console.log\(''TRX balance:'', acc ? \(acc.balance||0\)/1e6 : 0, ''TRX''\); const trc20=acc?.trc20||[]; const usdt=trc20.find\(t=>t[''TR7NHqjeKQxGTCi8q8ZY4pL8otSzgjLj6t'']\); console.log\(''USDT balance:'', usdt ? Number\(usdt[''TR7NHqjeKQxGTCi8q8ZY4pL8otSzgjLj6t'']\)/1e6 : 0, ''USDT''\)")
